qa_pairs.question: What does RAP membership represent in the context of Alliance resources?
qa_pairs.answer: RAP membership is represented as a group in LDAP, which defines a group of users authorized to submit jobs against the Resource Allocation Project Identifier (RAPI) and share files within the same Unix group.

qa_pairs.question: How are compute jobs assigned on the Niagara cluster, and what should a user do if they have multiple Principal Investigators (PIs)?
qa_pairs.answer: When a user submits a job to the scheduler on the Niagara cluster, it is assigned to the current allocation of their Principal Investigator (PI). If the user has more than one PI, meaning they belong to more than one group, they must specify a group name using the `--account` option when submitting the job.
